title: Smasiagon Magnetic Drawing Board Kids - Baby Girls Toys Ages 1-3, Portable Doodle Pad Educational Toys for 1 2 3 Year Old Toddler Girl Boy Birthday Gift (Pink)
features: 【Magnetic Drawing Board with Removable Legs】 This Magna Doodle Board comes with 4 removable legs and changed the use format for 3 ways. Unique screw tightening design and high-quality legs allow the drawing board to have a strong load-bearing capacity, up to 120lbs. No need to worry about shaking or breaking. It's a safe and perfect toddlers toy for girls and boys age 1-2 years old!

【Safe & Environmentally Friendly】 With high-quality ABS plastic construction, the drawing board is BPA- free with rounded edges, and curved pen tip preventing your kid from potential injuries. At the same time, a reinforced structure is adopted on the back to make the magnetic drawing board can withstand some hefty blows when dropped. It's a mess-free, reusable way to feed toddler girl age 1-2's desire to create and scribble.

【Large Drawing Area】 An Extra Large 8.9 inch Magnetic Drawing Board. The drawing area is up to 20.3*14.7cm. it's much bigger than some other drawing pads. Your child has enough space to draw, write, scribble and be creative on it.

【Educational Toys For Toddler Boys】 Draw, write and play games on this erasable sketch pad using the stylus to encourage your child's creativity and help them to learn how to express themselves visually. Not just for art. Use magnetic drawing boards for math, number recognition, learning shapes, even does their homework.

🎁【Gift for Preschoolers】 Your toddlers can express their own ideas in the drawings, practice letters and arithmetic through doodles. Our toddler writing board is a perfect gift for kids, giving full play to their creativity. Not only a nice holiday gift, birthday gift, Christmas gift, festivals gifts, visit gift for little girls and boys, but a relatively inexpensive way to give your child endless hours of artistic and educational opportunities.
description: Product Description A Relatively Inexpensive Way to Give Your Child Artistic Opportunities Whether playing tic-tac-toe, practicing math, learning about shapes, or creating pictures, a magnetic drawing board is a versatile tool for your child. A mess-free, reusable way to feed your child’s desire to create and scribble. Instead of costly reams of paper, paints, crayons, pencils, and other art supplies you need to restock, one board lasts as long as your child’s attention span. And your walls will be saved from those crayon or marker lines that can be hard to remove. These sketch pads can also be taken on car, train, boat, and plane journeys, and they won’t create a mess on grandma’s carpet the way paints might. It not just for art. Use magnetic drawing boards for math, number recognition, learning shapes, or for anything you might write down or draw. Use them to draw together, learn together, and laugh together. They offer a type of screen time you can feel good about. And when you’re child draws something extraordinary, remember to snap a quick picture of it before it’s erased. It is the perfect kids' toys choice as top Christmas gifts toys for kids, toddler boys Christmas gifts; Halloween gifts; birthday gifts. Specifications: Material: durable ABS plastic, BPA-free Board Size: 30.5*27cm (12*10.6in) Drawing Area: 20*15cm (8*5.8in) Color Zone: 4 colors in 4 zones (Red, Yellow, Blue, Green) Suitable Age: 12+ months Education: alphabet, mathematic, shape, painting, writing, etc. BSEN71-1 of the UKCA safety certification requires that children under 18 months must use a cord less than or equal to 22cm, otherwise it can easily wrap around the neck and become dangerous. Safe Material Made Toddler drawing board for kids is made of high quality non-toxic and tasteless ABS material, and has passed the safety test for baby toys over 12 months. Avoid Choking Risk There is no choking small parts in the package for 18 month+ year old girl. Flowing edge design to avoid 12 month year old girl's hand injury. 8.9" Larger Doodle Pad It provided children with wider and larger space painting, stimulating more creativity and imagination.
